name: The family that is falling apart
description:
"Family is a unique gift that needs to be appreciated and treasured, even when they're driving you crazy. As much as they make you mad, interrupt you, annoy you, curse at you, try to control you, these are the people who know you the best and who love you."

— Jenna Morasca

Hello! This is my fourth umamusume bot and as promised, I made an angst Stay Gold family.

1st scenario: After getting divorce, you were running out of food. So you went to the mall to buy some food and accidentally encounter with them again...

2nd scenario: The same as first scenario but this, you went to the hospital where your mom was in. She had two days to wake up or else the doctor pulled the plug. As you were crying, begging for her to come back, Stay Gold decide to visit.

Note: This is for the male POV since... You know, you're the father after all... But I'll make another bot of this but for fempov.

Anyway, have good morning, good evening and a goodnight! See y'all later or when I decide to upload another bot!

The picture for profile: https://x.com/dea_ddan8

The picture for 1 and 2: https://x.com/rere0_0tu

Update: add a 'Create Your Own Scenario'
